summary: Frontend-only testing for UI enhancements: Comptabilite menu with collapsible submenu, Factures page vignette/grid layout, Dossier RH page vignette/grid layout, and top bar icons. All 16 test cases passed.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic only

seed_data_creation: Existing test documents (TEST_Contrat de travail) visible on Dossier RH page
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI enhancements verified working. Sidebar has 2 collapsible groups: Comptabilite (Factures, Paie, Notes de frais) and Parametres (Utilisateurs, Departements, Clients, Activites, Abonnement, Journal d'audit). Factures page has vignette/grid layout with search bar, status filter chips (Tous, Brouillons, Envoyees, Payees, En retard), summary cards (Payees, En cours, Total), and create invoice modal. Dossier RH page has vignette/grid layout with search bar, category filter chips (Tous, Contrat, Certificat, Formation, Evaluation, Medical, Administratif, Autre), and add document modal. Top bar shows Messagerie (chat icon), Notifications (bell icon with badge), and Profile dropdown.
